title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a weekly roundup of AI developments including 3D generation, world models, large language model updates, and text-to-speech tools. The episode covers tools like Pixal3D for 3D object generation, Sana-WM for world modeling, MiniCPM for vision-language tasks, Krea2 for image generation, and new ChatGPT finance features.
